search_metadata.notes: Sankarankovil is a small town in Tirunelveli district. Dedicated wholesale-only spectacle lens suppliers are very limited. Most optical shops are retail-oriented but may offer bulk/B2B supply on request. For larger wholesale markets, nearby Tirunelveli city or Chennai offer more options.
